examples: He retired in 1970, on his fiftieth birthday.
He was stricken by a heart attack on his fiftieth birthday.
The fiftieth World Environment Day was on June 5th, 2021.
This week is the fiftieth anniversary of the publication of the book, The Feminine Mystique.
Something of the same uneasiness surrounded the hundred-and-fiftieth anniversary of the Italian state, on March 17th.
